choose.when:
<set-variable name="anthropicUsage" value="@{
                try {
                    var body = context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                    var usage = (JObject)body["usage"] ?? new JObject();
                    int inTok  = (int?)usage["input_tokens"]  ?? 0;
                    int outTok = (int?)usage["output_tokens"] ?? 0;
                    return new JObject(
                        new JProperty("input",  inTok),
                        new JProperty("output", outTok),
                        new JProperty("total",  inTok + outTok)
                    ).ToString();
                } catch { return "{\"input\":0,\"output\":0,\"total\":0}"; }
            }" />
            
            
            

            @{
                return new JObject(
                    new JProperty("id", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("idPrefix", "anthropic") + "-" + Guid.NewGuid().ToString()),
                    new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
                    new JProperty("month", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyy-MM")),
                    new JProperty("appId", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("appId", "claude-code")),
                    new JProperty("subscriptionId", context.Subscription?.Id?.ToString() ?? "Portal-Admin"),
                    new JProperty("productName", context.Product?.Name?.ToString() ?? "anthropic"),
                    new JProperty("targetService", "anthropic"),
                    new JProperty("model", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("gatewayName", context.Deployment?.ServiceName ?? "NA"),
                    new JProperty("gatewayRegion", context.Deployment?.Region ?? "NA"),
                    new JProperty("aiGatewayId", context.Deployment?.Gateway?.Id ?? "NA"),
                    new JProperty("RequestIp", context.Request?.IpAddress ?? "NA"),
                    new JProperty("operationName", context.Operation?.Name ?? "NA"),
                    // === Citadel additions ===
                    new JProperty("userOid", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("userOid", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("userUpn", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("userUpn", "NA")),
                    // =========================
                    new JProperty("backendId", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("backendId", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("routeLocation", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routeLocation", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("routeName", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routeName", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("deploymentName", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("deploymentName", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("promptTokens",   (int)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("promptTokens", 0)),
                    new JProperty("responseTokens", (int)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("responseTokens", 0)),
                    new JProperty("totalTokens",    (int)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("totalTokens", 0))
                ).ToString();
            }
